system.notes:
Abilities

  • Masking: The flesh form spirit can use the Masking ability of the Aura Manipulation Mysticism Talent at Force 4 and suffers no Drain from using it. The spirit can only target itself with this power, and can only disguise its astral signature, not its physical form. It suffers no penalties for sustaining the power.

Traits

  • Unphased: Can’t gain Frightened or Wounded status.
  • Toxin & Disease Immunity: The spirit is immune to
  • diseases & toxins other than insecticides.:
  • Banishing Resistance: When targeted by the Negate
  • Mysticism power, double the spirit’s Force.:
  • Dual Natured: Insect spirits always exist on both the
  • astral and physical plane.:
